description: Legal document. In Judaeo-Arabic. Approximately 6 lines are preserved from the middle section. Involves a house, a partnership, Abū l-Surur, and Yūsuf. On verso there is Hebrew literary text. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
